title: gitmap llm-docs --format=json
description: Machine-readable shape emitted by `gitmap llm-docs --format=json`. Top-level is a single object whose keys are conditionally appended based on the --sections filter. When present, key order is contractual: commands, architecture, flags, conventions, structure, database, installation, patterns. `commands` is an array of command groups; every other key is a markdown-formatted string. All keys are optional because the --sections filter can suppress any of them.

commands.description: Ordered list of command groups. Each group has a title and a commands array.

title.description: Display title for the command group.

commands.description: Commands belonging to this group. Per-command key order is contractual: name, alias, description, example.

example.description: Optional realistic invocation example. Omitted when empty.
